description: ADAPT is AgGateway’s open-source Agricultural Data Application Programming Toolkit for moving and converting precision agriculture data between software and hardware systems. The adaptframework.org site is primarily an informational hub for the toolkit, its model, plugins, and related documentation.
summary: adaptframework.org exposes a public open-source CLI surface via ADAPT CLI; the site itself documents the ADAPT toolkit and links out to third-party plugin developer portals rather than hosting its own public web APIs, GraphQL APIs, or MCP servers.
